rationale: Changed the provider profiles table divider utility to md:divide-y so the hidden mobile header does not leave an extra top border above the card list.
Added explicit table, rowgroup, row, columnheader, and cell roles plus stable header associations for the responsive table/card layout.
Review summary covered the same divider and accessibility feedback, both of which were addressed in this change.
Replaced display:none on the mobile table header with visually-hidden styling and added headers mappings so header context remains available to assistive technologies.
Automated review wrapper text only; it contained no separate actionable request beyond the linked review comments.
